Separately, investigation validated that the Claude Code stop-hook auto-continue is structurally one-shot (stop_hook_active is a persistent session-wide flag; Claude Code's built-in loop-guard enforces the floor even if the hook tries to bypass). PHASE_008 fleet-awareness will need re-scoping once unit_bugfix_002 lands.
